title: wendlandia notoniana
intro: Wendlandia notoniana is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the 'Toothache Plant' due to its traditional use in treating toothaches. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Wendlandia notoniana include relief from toothaches, gum inflammation, and other oral health issues, as well as potential anti-cancer and anti-viral properties. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal benefits.
